nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as full content creator replacing personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I might start a conversation with an AI to get ideas

nodes.label: Personal writing and creative control
nodes.grounding_span: I still want to be doing the writing so that the material represents my perspective

nodes.label: AI alignment with personal perspective
nodes.grounding_span: the ideas I get don't quite match what I'm looking for

nodes.label: Gradual adoption through habit and experimentation
nodes.label_negative: Forced or rushed adoption without testing
nodes.grounding_span: I need time to test things and find what works for me

nodes.label: AI use in client-facing work
nodes.label_negative: Overt AI presence in client interactions
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to bring it too obviously into the client-facing side of my work

nodes.label: Authentic self-representation and personal growth
nodes.grounding_span: the struggle of writing it myself actually leads me to better ideas and a better understanding of myself and my work

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I can save time on both crystallizing the ideas and researching the minute details

nodes.label: Professional integrity and client trust
nodes.grounding_span: I work with a lot of clients who have objections to AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a brainstorming aid
nodes.grounding_span: I might start a conversation with an AI to get ideas

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misalignment
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I get frustrated when the ideas I get don't quite match what I'm looking for

nodes.label: Openness to gradual increased use
nodes.grounding_span: I can imagine myself eventually incorporating AI into more of my work

nodes.label: Caution about AI in client-facing roles
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to bring it too obviously into the client-facing side of my work

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth with AI for idea refinement
nodes.grounding_span: A bit of back and forth. First, I might use AI to get an idea... then I start writing and go back to the AI

nodes.label: Slow adoption with need for personal testing
nodes.grounding_span: I'm slow to adopt new technology because I'm a creature of habit
